'''âk-l-n-m''' ('''kakalnemoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:cuckquean|cuckquean]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| k-l-n-m
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:cuckquean|cuckquean]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âk-l-n-m
|-
! Lemma
| kakalnemoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thikalnemoko|thikalnemoko]] || [[word:jikalnemoko|jikalnemoko]] || [[word:shikalnemoko|shikalnemoko]] || [[word:kikalnemoko|kikalnemoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthukalnemoko|thuthukalnemoko]] || [[word:jujukalnemoko|jujukalnemoko]] || [[word:shushukalnemoko|shushukalnemoko]] || [[word:kukukalnemoko|kukukalnemoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thukalnemoko|thukalnemoko]] || [[word:jukalnemoko|jukalnemoko]] || [[word:shukalnemoko|shukalnemoko]] || [[word:kukalnemoko|kukalnemoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thukalnemoko|thukalnemoko]] || [[word:jukalnemoko|jukalnemoko]] || [[word:shukalnemoko|shukalnemoko]] || [[word:kukalnemoko|kukalnemoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thekalnemoko|thekalnemoko]] || [[word:jekalnemoko|jekalnemoko]] || [[word:shekalnemoko|shekalnemoko]] || [[word:kekalnemoko|kekalnemoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothokalnemoko|thothokalnemoko]] || [[word:jojokalnemoko|jojokalnemoko]] || [[word:shoshokalnemoko|shoshokalnemoko]] || [[word:kokokalnemoko|kokokalnemoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thokalnemoko|thokalnemoko]] || [[word:jokalnemoko|jokalnemoko]] || [[word:shokalnemoko|shokalnemoko]] || [[word:kokalnemoko|kokalnemoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thokalnemoko|thokalnemoko]] || [[word:jokalnemoko|jokalnemoko]] || [[word:shokalnemoko|shokalnemoko]] || [[word:kokalnemoko|kokalnemoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠkalnemoko|thĂŠkalnemoko]] || [[word:jĂŠkalnemoko|jĂŠkalnemoko]] || [[word:shĂŠkalnemoko|shĂŠkalnemoko]] || [[word:kĂŠkalnemoko|kĂŠkalnemoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathakalnemoko|thathakalnemoko]] || [[word:jajakalnemoko|jajakalnemoko]] || [[word:shashakalnemoko|shashakalnemoko]] || [[word:kakakalnemoko|kakakalnemoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thakalnemoko|thakalnemoko]] || [[word:jakalnemoko|jakalnemoko]] || [[word:shakalnemoko|shakalnemoko]] || [[word:kakalnemoko|kakalnemoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thakalnemoko|thakalnemoko]] || [[word:jakalnemoko|jakalnemoko]] || [[word:shakalnemoko|shakalnemoko]] || [[word:kakalnemoko|kakalnemoko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''

! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
